message:
Fix process termination on SSH command timeout

Change from child.kill().await to drop(child) for cleaner process
termination when commands timeout.

Rationale:
- Dropping the child handle signals process termination in openssh crate
- Avoids potential issues with kill() on already-exited processes
- Simpler code path with same effect
- Both execute() and execute_streaming() updated consistently

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
